creator: toyonaga@jp.fujitsu.com
text:
Sorry for _very_ late response. I confirmed transfig now builds fine.
I think its OK to close this PR. Am I suppoesed to take some action on 
gnats or is this message suffice?


From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@mavetju.org>
Subject: Re: ports/17897: transfig does not compile with XFree86-4.0
Date: Thu, 08 Nov 2001 14:40:49 +1100

> The port currently builds fine with XFree86-4.1.0_10
> Maybe it should be closed now (after 1.5 years)
